title: Woodland Elf low roll adds 10 Atk damage

card.rawText: During each battle, prior to your Hit Dice Roll, roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: +10 Atk damage. 3-4: Target's Modifier reduced to 0. 5-6: Target's AL reduced by 5.

effect.value: During each battle, prior to your Hit Dice Roll, roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: +10 Atk damage. 3-4: Target's Modifier reduced to 0. 5-6: Target's AL reduced by 5.

plan.title: Woodland Elf low roll adds 10 Atk damage
plan.summary: Force Woodland Elf pre-hit roll to 1 and verify the +10 attack damage branch.

notes: Read text first: During each battle, prior to your Hit Dice Roll, roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: +10 Atk damage. 3-4: Target's Modifier reduced to 0. 5-6: Target's AL reduced by 5.

expectedAssertions.label: Woodland Elf extra damage branch represented

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Force Woodland Elf pre-hit roll to 1 and verify the +10 attack damage branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
